message.thinking:

2. Description: Does the text briefly describe contents of each section? No, it's just tasks. So false.

3. Structure: Can it be easily understood what is the general structure of the thesis just from this text? No, it's just a schedule. So false.

Thus all false. Provide feedback accordingly.
